languages.original_text: "We encountered a strange creature. I would not be wrong, I think, in calling it a metaphor incarnate. Its reactions are completely irrational: I almost burned my cranial implants to a crisp trying to calculate predictive patterns in its behaviour."

languages.text: "Мы повстречали странное создание. Думаю, не ошибусь, если назову его воплощенной метафорой. Его реакции абсолютно иррациональны: при попытке рассчитать предиктивные паттерны поведения я едва не сжег дотла свои краниальные импланты".

"We encountered a strange creature. I would not be wrong, I think, in calling it a metaphor incarnate. Its reactions are completely irrational: I almost burned my cranial implants to a crisp trying to calculate predictive patterns in its behaviour."
languages.original_text: "Мы повстречали странное создание. Думаю, не ошибусь, если назову его воплощенной метафорой. Его реакции абсолютно иррациональны: при попытке рассчитать предиктивные паттерны поведения я едва не сжег дотла свои краниальные импланты".

traits.locale_text: "We encountered a strange creature. I would not be wrong, I think, in calling it a metaphor incarnate. Its reactions are completely irrational: I almost burned my cranial implants to a crisp trying to calculate predictive patterns in its behaviour."

"We encountered a strange creature. I would not be wrong, I think, in calling it a metaphor incarnate. Its reactions are completely irrational: I almost burned my cranial implants to a crisp trying to calculate predictive patterns in its behaviour."

"We encountered a strange creature. I would not be wrong, I think, in calling it a metaphor incarnate. Its reactions are completely irrational: I almost burned my cranial implants to a crisp trying to calculate predictive patterns in its behaviour."

languages.text: «Nos hemos encontrado con una criatura extraña. No creo equivocarme al describirlo como la encarnación de una metáfora, un ser de reacciones completamente irracionales. Casi me arden los implantes craneales al intentar calcular pautas predictivas en su comportamiento».
languages.original_text: "We encountered a strange creature. I would not be wrong, I think, in calling it a metaphor incarnate. Its reactions are completely irrational: I almost burned my cranial implants to a crisp trying to calculate predictive patterns in its behaviour."

traits.locale_text: «Nos hemos encontrado con una criatura extraña. No creo equivocarme al describirlo como la encarnación de una metáfora, un ser de reacciones completamente irracionales. Casi me arden los implantes craneales al intentar calcular pautas predictivas en su comportamiento».

languages.text: 「我々は奇妙な存在に遭遇しました。それを『隠喩の化身』と呼んでも、おそらく間違いではないでしょう。その反応はまったく非合理的で、その行動の予測パターンを算出しようとして、私は危うく頭蓋インプラントを丸焦げにするところでした」
languages.original_text: "We encountered a strange creature. I would not be wrong, I think, in calling it a metaphor incarnate. Its reactions are completely irrational: I almost burned my cranial implants to a crisp trying to calculate predictive patterns in its behaviour."

traits.locale_text: 「我々は奇妙な存在に遭遇しました。それを『隠喩の化身』と呼んでも、おそらく間違いではないでしょう。その反応はまったく非合理的で、その行動の予測パターンを算出しようとして、私は危うく頭蓋インプラントを丸焦げにするところでした」

languages.text: “我们遇到了一种奇特的生物。我认为称其为‘隐喻的化身’并不过分。它的行为完全不符合逻辑，为推演其行动模式，我差点把自己的颅脑植入物烧坏。”
languages.original_text: "We encountered a strange creature. I would not be wrong, I think, in calling it a metaphor incarnate. Its reactions are completely irrational: I almost burned my cranial implants to a crisp trying to calculate predictive patterns in its behaviour."

traits.locale_text: “我们遇到了一种奇特的生物。我认为称其为‘隐喻的化身’并不过分。它的行为完全不符合逻辑，为推演其行动模式，我差点把自己的颅脑植入物烧坏。”

languages.text: "Wir sind einer seltsamen Kreatur begegnet. Ich denke, es wäre nicht falsch, sie als Fleisch gewordene Metapher zu bezeichnen. Ihre Reaktionen sind komplett irrational: Ich hätte beim Versuch, ihre Verhaltensmuster zu berechnen, beinahe meine Kranialimplantate gegrillt."
languages.original_text: "We encountered a strange creature. I would not be wrong, I think, in calling it a metaphor incarnate. Its reactions are completely irrational: I almost burned my cranial implants to a crisp trying to calculate predictive patterns in its behaviour."

traits.locale_text: "Wir sind einer seltsamen Kreatur begegnet. Ich denke, es wäre nicht falsch, sie als Fleisch gewordene Metapher zu bezeichnen. Ihre Reaktionen sind komplett irrational: Ich hätte beim Versuch, ihre Verhaltensmuster zu berechnen, beinahe meine Kranialimplantate gegrillt."

languages.text: « Nous avons croisé une étrange créature. Je ne pense pas me tromper en la qualifiant de métaphore incarnée. Ses réactions sont totalement irrationnelles : j'ai presque calciné mes implants en tentant de calculer des schémas de comportement prévisibles. »
languages.original_text: "We encountered a strange creature. I would not be wrong, I think, in calling it a metaphor incarnate. Its reactions are completely irrational: I almost burned my cranial implants to a crisp trying to calculate predictive patterns in its behaviour."

traits.locale_text: « Nous avons croisé une étrange créature. Je ne pense pas me tromper en la qualifiant de métaphore incarnée. Ses réactions sont totalement irrationnelles : j'ai presque calciné mes implants en tentant de calculer des schémas de comportement prévisibles. »

languages.text: "Tuhaf bir yaratıkla karşılaştık. Sanırım ona beden bulmuş bir metafor demek yanlış olmaz. Tepkileri tamamen mantıksız: Davranışlarındaki tahminî kalıpları hesaplamaya çalışırken kafatası implantlarımı neredeyse kavuruyordum."
languages.original_text: "We encountered a strange creature. I would not be wrong, I think, in calling it a metaphor incarnate. Its reactions are completely irrational: I almost burned my cranial implants to a crisp trying to calculate predictive patterns in its behaviour."

traits.locale_text: "Tuhaf bir yaratıkla karşılaştık. Sanırım ona beden bulmuş bir metafor demek yanlış olmaz. Tepkileri tamamen mantıksız: Davranışlarındaki tahminî kalıpları hesaplamaya çalışırken kafatası implantlarımı neredeyse kavuruyordum."
